records.ety: [AS. ælf, ylf; akin to MHG. alp, G. alp nightmare, incubus, Icel. ālfr elf, Sw. alf, elfva; cf. Skr. bhu skillful, artful, rabh to grasp. Cf. Auf, Oaf.]

defs: An imaginary supernatural being, commonly a little sprite, much like a fairy; a mythological diminutive spirit, supposed to haunt hills and wild places, and generally represented as delighting in mischievous tricks.
quotes: Every elf, and fairy sprite, Hop as light as bird from brier.

defs: A very diminutive person; a dwarf.
To entangle mischievously, as an elf might do.
quotes: Elf all my hair in knots.
